title: DragonMine Z: Passives+
description: An add-on for DragonMine Z that adds new passives
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72efcf2b487db2acb2780f5669a747e2412a033a.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DragonMine Z: Passives+ is an add-on that introduces new passive abilities to DragonMine Z. This mod is still a work in progress (WIP), but it will be updated with more passives over time.

## Currently implemented passive:
- **Rage Mode**: When the player remains below 25% of their maximum health for 5 seconds, their STR, SKP, and PWR stats are doubled for 40 seconds.
Cooldown: 5 minutes.
(This passive has not been fully tested yet. If you find any bugs, please leave a comment.)
- **Self Destruction**: Allows you to explode when you are below %10 of your health.
- **Ki Master**: Increases damage with Ki Weapons and boosts Ki regeneration.
- **Long Reach**: Allows activating a mode that increases attack range but consumes more stamina.
- **Ki Absorption**: Absorb incoming Ki attacks while blocking to gain energy and stat boosts.
- **Cold Blood**: Boosts your stats when exposed to the sun.
- **Parasitism**: Infect your enemies, steal their life, and gain a buff upon killing them.
- **Tenacity**: increases the RES stat as HP is lost.
How to enable these passives:

To implement these passives in your mod, go to the DragonMine Z config folder.
Open the "races" section and select the race you want to assign the passive to.

Under "racialSkill", enter the ID of the passive.

## Passive IDs:
- Rage Mode: "rage_mode"
- Self Destruction: "self_destruction"
- Ki Master: "ki_master"
- Long Reach: "long_reach"
- Ki Absorption: "ki_absorption"
- Cold Blood: "cold_blood"
- Parasitism: "parasitism"
- Tenacity: "tenacity"

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The mod adds a config file where you can set the health percentages and the multipliers

If you enjoy the project and would like to support me, you can do so on Ko-fi. That said, there’s absolutely no obligation, since this is a non-profit project.
